title: Introduction to Financial Markets
description: Understand the structure and mechanics of global financial markets, including equity, fixed income, derivatives, and foreign exchange markets. Learn how these markets operate and why they present computational challenges suitable for quantum computing.
learningObjectives: Identify and describe the major types of financial markets
Explain the role of market participants and intermediaries
Understand market microstructure and order types
Recognize computational challenges in modern financial markets
Connect financial market complexity to quantum computing opportunities
